title: Stainless Steel Bread Lame - Premium Timeless Design Dough Scoring Tool - Includes 10 Replaceable Blades Stored in Handmade Linen Bag - Best Bread Scoring Experience
features: - Extremely accurate dough scoring tool with excellent handgrip for best baking results. Our solid bread lame's unique design and shape delivers outstanding ease of use and experience. BEST ON MARKET *Simply read our Reviews*.
- Stainless steel is a very kitchen friendly material that makes cleaning our bread lame effortless! Just wash with water and rinse to look like new. Easy to clean, customers love it.

- A 10 pack of double edge stainless steel blades is included (others only offer 1 to 5 lames at most!) and stored in a sturdy natural linen bag. A complete ready to use set, safe and practical to store!
International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
description: Product Description Our Story The art of baking bread has long been a tradition in our South of France family. However, our creative minds always thought we should do more and use our experience to bring unique premium tools for the baking world. A family passion turned into a family business! Premium Bread Lames for the Home Baker A New Standard O'Delice Bakery is a unique bakery tool utensils brand crafted with love from the South of France, a truly premium feel to your kitchen. We design innovative shapes and use top of the line materials to build lasting professional tools for the home baker . Take your baking skills to new highs! Bread lames built by professional chefs Outstanding ease of use with solid grip Contemporary & timeless design Accurate scoring experience for home bakers Extremely solid materials & easy to clean Beautiful yet Advanced Scoring Bread Lame: O'Delice's Stainless Steel Edition Bread Lame for Authentic Artisan Baking 10 BLADES INCLUDED Within your kit you will find 10 replaceable double edge stainless steel blades stored in a natural & sturdy linen fabric bag. Safe & Practical! SUPERIOR DESIGN Our Stainless Steel bread lame has been crafted to deliver a comfortable dough scoring experience, with the right weight, feel in hand and accuracy. EASY TO USE From advanced professional bakers to those just starting out, our bread lame is suited for all and we promise is a tool you'll love using. MINIMALIST DESIGN BUILT TO LAST O’Delice's premium handcrafted bread lame is made of beautiful timeless top quality stainless steel. With a passion for excellence, our highly accurate & effortless dough scoring tool was designed for achieving outstanding performance for chefs and home bakers. Discover a new level of precision and accuracy. Included instructions on how to attach the blade to the bread lame will help you easily and seamlessly get started with baking your favorite breads and achieve beautiful results! O'Delice Bakery Rediscover baking with finesse, make every bread unique and delicious! Designed in France & Built to Last.
